# color

## Import

```typescript
import { ColorComponent } from '@lucca-front/ng/color';
```

## API Reference

### ColorComponent (component)

**Selector:** `lu-color`

#### Inputs

| Property | Binding name | Type | Default | Required | Transform | Description |
|----------|-------------|------|---------|----------|-----------|-------------|
| `value` | `value` | `string \| null` | `null` | — | — | — |
| `borderColor` | `borderColor` | `string \| null` | `null` | — | — | — |
| `size` | `size` | `ColorSize \| null` | `null` | — | — | — |
| `hiddenName` | `hiddenName` | `boolean` | `false` | — | `booleanAttribute` | — |
